title: Prayer
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'prayer'?
What do you pray for?
Are your prayers always answered?
Do you feel different after you pray?
Is it possible to pray for something bad?
Is it selfish to pray for something for yourself?
Do you think prayer time should be a part of school life?
Do you think something has gone wrong if a prayer is unanswered?
Do you believe in the healing power of prayer?
Is it important to say a prayer before and after meals?
How often do you pray?
What's your favourite prayer?
Where is the best place to pray?
Can you take lessons on how to pray better?
What do you think all people should pray for?
How can you prove to someone who doesn't believe in prayer that it works?
Do you think people who pray have better lives?
What do you think of prayer groups?
If you could have one prayer answered, what would it be?
Do you think the prayers you make up are better than the prayers found in holy books?
